proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher values of feature_080 (continuous, range 30-90) are associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher values of the ordinal feature_063 (0/1/2) are associated with shorter pfs_months (linear trend).
Patients with feature_056=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_056=0.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=0.7015, p~0; feature_080 is the single strongest correlate of pfs_months. Quintile means: 2.28, 3.71, 4.67, 5.64, 7.21 months across Q1->Q5. Linear regression slope = +0.176 months per unit (R^2=0.49).
Strong negative monotonic trend: feature_063=0 mean PFS=5.64 (n=17592); =1 mean=4.44 (n=24971); =2 mean=3.29 (n=7437). Linear slope = -1.18 months per unit, r=-0.32, p~0.
feature_056=1 (n=14969) mean PFS=3.62; =0 (n=35031) mean=5.15. Mean diff = -1.54 months, Welch t=-66.6, p~0. Strongly negative prognostic factor.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_042=1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with feature_042=0.
Patients with feature_048=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_048=0.
Patients with feature_111=1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with feature_111=0.
Patients with feature_039=1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with feature_039=0.
Higher continuous feature_067 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with feature_015=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_015=0.
Higher continuous feature_019 is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher continuous feature_101 is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_042=1 (n=17428) PFS=5.41; =0 (n=32572) PFS=4.31. Diff=+1.10 months, p~0. Large positive effect.
Pearson r=-0.116, p=4e-148. Modest negative association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across categories of feature_011 (race: white/asian/black/hispanic/other).
Mean pfs_months in black patients (feature_011='black') is lower than in white patients (feature_011='white').
Mean pfs_months differs across categories of feature_089 (insurance: medicaid/private/medicare/uninsured).
Mean pfs_months in medicaid-insured patients is lower than in privately insured patients.
The relationship between feature_080 and pfs_months is approximately linear (no obvious threshold or U-shape).

analyses.result_summary: Means: white 4.679, asian 4.735, black 4.717, hispanic 4.707, other 4.762. ANOVA F=0.85, p=0.49. No race effect on PFS.
Black (n=5889) PFS=4.717 vs white (n=32498) PFS=4.679. Diff=+0.037 months, p=0.29 - not different.
Means: medicaid 4.706, private 4.685, medicare 4.692, uninsured 4.733. ANOVA F=0.31, p=0.82. No insurance effect.
Medicaid (n=6911) PFS=4.706 vs private (n=20090) PFS=4.685. Diff=+0.021, p=0.54.
Quintile means rise smoothly 2.28->3.71->4.67->5.64->7.21 months; linear slope=+0.176 months/unit, R^2=0.49. Approximately linear, no threshold.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment, feature_080, feature_063, feature_056, feature_042, feature_048, feature_067, feature_015, feature_111, feature_019, feature_101, and feature_040 each remain independently associated with pfs_months.
The negative association between feature_063 and pfs_months strengthens (becomes more negative) at higher values of feature_080 (interaction effect).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_080 + feature_063 + feature_056 + feature_042 + feature_048 + feature_067 + feature_015 + feature_111 + feature_039 + feature_019 + feature_101 + feature_040 + feature_034
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficients (all p<0.001 unless noted): feature_080 +0.176, feature_063 -1.17, feature_056 -1.55, feature_042 +1.10, feature_048 -0.98, feature_067 -0.077, feature_015 -0.58, feature_111 +0.53, feature_019 +0.48, feature_101 -0.019, feature_040 -0.47. feature_039 (+0.014, p=0.32) and feature_034 (+0.002, p=0.88) are NOT independent after adjustment. Model R^2=0.79.
Interaction coef = -0.0057 per unit (p=5.6e-08). Statistically significant but very small relative to main effects (-1.17 main, +0.176 main); marginal clinical magnitude.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive PFS effect of feature_042 is abolished (interaction near -1*main_effect) in patients with feature_015=1 versus feature_015=0.
The positive PFS effect of feature_042 is abolished in patients with feature_040=1 versus feature_040=0.
The positive PFS effect of feature_111 is abolished in patients with feature_015=1 versus feature_015=0.
The positive PFS effect of feature_111 is abolished in patients with feature_040=1.
The positive PFS effect of feature_039 is abolished in patients with feature_015=1.

analyses.result_summary: Main effect feature_042 (when feature_015=0) = +1.659; interaction = -1.623 (p=4e-255). Effect of feature_042 essentially eliminated when feature_015=1: 0.036 vs 1.659. Strong qualitative interaction.
Main feature_042 (feature_040=0) = +1.350; interaction = -1.364 (p=2e-118). Effect again eliminated.
Main feature_111 (feature_015=0) = +0.845; interaction = -0.800 (p=1e-56). Same qualitative pattern.
Main feature_111 (feature_040=0) = +0.687; interaction = -0.660 (p=4e-26). Effect erased in feature_040=1.
Main feature_039 (feature_015=0) = +0.554; interaction = -0.557 (p=1e-30). Effect erased in feature_015=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with feature_015=0, feature_042=1 increases mean pfs_months substantially compared to feature_042=0; in patients with feature_015=1 the difference is negligible.
In patients with feature_040=0, feature_042=1 increases mean pfs_months substantially compared to feature_042=0; in patients with feature_040=1 the difference is negligible.
feature_015 and feature_040 are statistically independent (no association).

analyses.result_summary: feature_015=0: feature_042 1 vs 0 means = 5.97 vs 4.31, diff=+1.66 (p=0). feature_015=1: 4.35 vs 4.32, diff=+0.04 (p=0.29). Confirms predictive (not prognostic) interaction.
feature_040=0: feature_042 1 vs 0 = 5.66 vs 4.31, diff=+1.35 (p=0). feature_040=1: 4.31 vs 4.32, diff=-0.01 (p=0.77). Same predictive pattern.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of feature_042 on pfs_months does NOT depend on feature_080 (no clinically meaningful continuous-by-treatment interaction).
The positive effect of feature_042 on pfs_months does NOT depend on feature_063 (performance-status-like ordinal).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_080_c * feature_042; subgroup by feature_080 quartile
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.0032/unit (p=0.044, just-borderline significant but trivially small). Subgroup feature_042 effect across feature_080 Q1-Q4 = +1.16, +1.12, +1.07, +1.04 - essentially uniform. No clinically meaningful modification.
Interaction coef = +0.009 (p=0.78). Subgroup feature_042 effect by feature_063=0/1/2 = +1.12, +1.09, +1.15 - identical. No modification.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of feature_042 on pfs_months is largest when BOTH feature_015=0 AND feature_040=0, and is null in any patient with feature_015=1 or feature_040=1.
The positive effect of feature_042 on pfs_months is identical across all 5 race categories (no demographic disparity in benefit).
The positive effect of feature_042 on pfs_months is identical across all 4 insurance categories.

analyses.code: Stratified mean PFS by joint feature_015 x feature_040 status

analyses.result_summary: feature_042 effect by race: white +1.107, asian +1.062, black +1.060, hispanic +1.115, other +1.007. All highly significant. Effects nearly identical (range 1.01-1.12) - no race-by-treatment interaction.
feature_042 effect by insurance: medicaid +1.081, private +1.091, medicare +1.110, uninsured +1.097. All highly significant. Identical magnitude across insurance categories.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the 'eligible' subgroup (feature_015=0 AND feature_040=0), feature_042 and feature_111 have additive independent positive effects on pfs_months, while feature_039 adds nothing once feature_111 and feature_042 are accounted for.

In the 'biomarker-positive' subgroup (feature_015=1 OR feature_040=1), feature_042, feature_111, and feature_039 have NO effect on pfs_months, but the prognostic factors (feature_080, feature_063, feature_056, feature_048) still operate.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_042 + feature_111 + feature_039 + feature_080 + feature_063 + feature_056 + feature_048 within doubly-negative subgroup
analyses.result_summary: n=26760. Adjusted coefs: feature_042 +2.05 (p~0), feature_111 +0.98 (p~0), feature_039 +0.034 (p=0.17, NS), feature_080 +0.176, feature_063 -1.18, feature_056 -1.54, feature_048 -0.97. R^2=0.73. feature_039 effect collapses once feature_042 and feature_111 are adjusted - it is a confounded marker rather than an independent treatment.

n=23240. Treatment-like coefs: feature_042 +0.0015 (p=0.80), feature_111 +0.013 (p=0.11), feature_039 -0.004 (p=0.66) - all null. Prognostic coefs unchanged: feature_080 +0.176, feature_063 -1.17, feature_056 -1.55, feature_048 -0.97. R^2=0.96 (very high in this subgroup because removing the 'treatment-eligible' arm of variance leaves a near-deterministic prognostic structure).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the eligible (doubly-negative) subgroup, feature_042 and feature_111 act SYNERGISTICALLY: neither feature_042 alone nor feature_111 alone produces benefit, but their combination produces a large positive effect on pfs_months.
The continuous prognostic effect of feature_080 on pfs_months (slope ~+0.176 months per unit) is identical across all 4 cells of the feature_015 x feature_040 cross-tab.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_042 + feature_111 + feature_042*feature_111 + covariates within doubly-negative subgroup; plus 4-cell PFS means
analyses.result_summary: In doubly-negative subgroup: feature_042 alone = 0.000 (p=0.999), feature_111 alone = 0.000 (p=0.989), feature_042*feature_111 = +2.92 (p~0). 4-cell mean PFS: (0,0)=4.31 (n=5324), (0,1)=4.30 (n=12110), (1,0)=4.27 (n=2755), (1,1)=7.21 (n=6571). Striking synergistic interaction - both treatments must be co-administered and biomarkers must be negative for benefit.

analyses.code: Stratified linregress feature_080 vs pfs_months within each (feature_015, feature_040) cell
analyses.result_summary: Slopes essentially identical: (0,0) +0.1753, (0,1) +0.1772, (1,0) +0.1772, (1,1) +0.1774. R^2 ranges 0.41-0.69. feature_080 is a purely prognostic factor that operates equally regardless of biomarker status.
